hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-light tracking-tight text-foreground
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-light tracking-tight text-foreground

button.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-none px-8 py-4 transition-colors
button.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-none px-8 py-4 transition-colors
button.outline: border border-foreground text-foreground hover:bg-foreground hover:text-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 transition-colors

card.product: bg-card border border-border group overflow-hidden cursor-pointer
card.image: w-full h-full object-cover transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:scale-105

components.header: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-border transition-all

motion.page_load: framer-motion fade-in and slide-up for sections

images.description: florist studio hero image, wide landscape

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the landing page hero and product grids. Avoid Shadcn Cards for creative layout sections, just use semantic HTML.

For the e-commerce checkout, cart, user dashboard, and admin panel, use Shadcn UI components but heavily customize them to remove the default tech 'Vercel' look (e.g., replace radii, add custom colors).
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
Implement a generous spacing scale. Don't cramp the layout.
The hero section should use 'florist_hero' as background with 'bg-black/30' overlay max. Use text-shadow if needed.
Product images must have a 4:5 aspect ratio.
Avoid center-alignment for everything; use left-alignment for product details and dense text.
Integrate Lucide-react for icons. Size them elegantly.
For date selection in checkout, use Shadcn Calendar but style it warmly.
DO NOT use Inter or standard sans-serif for headings.
Ensure hover states are clearly defined with color shifts, not just opacity.
All components must be accessible and include aria labels where necessary.
